=== Dylan_1996_07_19_Molde_info.txt
===================
===================
===================
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
BOB DYLAN
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~


7/27/96	
Molde, Norway
Molde Jazz Festival

CDR -> flac

the same recording as LB-3494, but not the same fileset
	
from the lb info-file:

Linage: Audio CD (trade) > FLACS, FLAWS, d1t08>09 slight uneven track transition, 
d2t05>06 tape edit; not much except noise above 16k; very good sound [B]; 
some clipping on real loud spots and some hiss

discontinuity pop d1t2 2:38, d1t5 2:30, d2t1 3:23, 7:11, 7:12, 7:53


Disc 1 [74:33.41] 

1. To Be Alone With You, 
2. Pretty Peggy-O (trad. arr. Bob Dylan), 
3. All Along The Watchtower, 
4. Just Like A Woman, 
5. Watching The River Flow, 
6. Silvio (Bob Dylan & Robert Hunter), 
7. It's All Over Now, Baby Blue, 
8. Tangled Up In Blue, 
9. Mr. Tambourine Man, 
10. John Brown, 

Disc 2 [47:56.14] 

1. Maggie's Farm, 
2. I Shall Be Released, 
3. Real Real Gone (Van Morrison), 
4. My Back Pages, 
5. Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35, 
6. It Ain't Me, Babe 

enjoy
